arts.ttl: Newcastle United monitor intriguing Bundesliga hotshot's status with future in doubt
arts.sum: Now 29, Guirassy's form has been sparkling this season, with 24 goals to his name in all competitions, including 10 in the Champions League. Newcastle United are monitoring Serhou Guirassy's situation at Borussia Dortmund after missing out on a £17million bargain last summer.

arts.ttl: Preview: RB Leipzig vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between RB Leipzig and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Assured Nico Schlotterbeck proving ever-more vital to Borussia Dortmund and Germany
arts.sum: After coming agonisingly close to winning the Bundesliga in his first season at Signal Iduna Park following a high-profile move from Freiburg, the Germany international just missed out on major silverware against last term when Dortmund went down to Real Madrid in the 2024 UEFA Champions League final. As each season passes, Borussia Dortmund and Germany defender Nico Schlotterbeck continues to go from strength-to-strength, and with the 25-year-old commanding a vital position in the Black-and-Yellows set-up, the defender appears one-day destined for the role of team leader.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund wing rocket Karim Adeyemi blasts way back into Germany squad
arts.sum: He has always been an incredible option for teams looking to play on the break, and it is no surprise that two of his three goals under Kovač have come that way, in a 2-0 win away at St. Pauli and 3-0 win at Sporting Lisbon in the Champions League knockout play-off second leg. Adeyemi has five Champions League goals for Dortmund this season.

arts.ttl: Lothar Matthäus on Bayern Munich's European dreams, 'surprise package' Mainz and Borussia Dortmund's inconsistencies
arts.sum: The legendary Bayern Munich and Germany midfielder talks to bundesliga.com about his former club's European aims, why Mainz are this season's breath of fresh air and discusses Borussia Dortmund's hot-and-cold campaign. They’re on the right path, with an eight-point lead over Leverkusen in the Bundesliga and they’re in with a chance to reach the Champions League final in Munich on 31 May, which would, of course, be a home game – an additional incentive to get there.

arts.ttl: What is Barcelona boss Hansi Flick’s record vs Borussia Dortmund?
arts.sum: An insight into Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick’s historical record in fixtures against Borussia Dortmund has on Thursday been provided. And the figures paint an altogether encouraging picture for those…
